last_known_good.proof: dashboard pod amof-amof-control-plane-dashboard-b47d7f7-mzz5g running before failed wave5 image rollout

auth_env_recovery.cause: Wave 4d proof enabled AMOF_AUTH_ENABLED and internal-control auth on the in-cluster controlplane; local dashboard auth shell then showed Platform login unavailable for the local proof path.

registry_regression.host_k3d_internal_failure: containerd attempted HTTPS to host.k3d.internal:5000 and got an HTTP registry response
registry_regression.k3d_registry_failure: containerd attempted HTTP to k3d-amof-registry:5000 but the node could not resolve k3d-amof-registry
registry_regression.working_pull_policy_path: import image into k3d node under host.k3d.internal:5000 tag, then deploy with imagePullPolicy IfNotPresent
registry_regression.proof: test pod reported image already present on machine and ran image-present-ok

recovery_actions: Restored local controlplane auth env to auth-disabled local posture
Verified /api/v1/auth/session reports auth_enabled=false and console permissions true
Proved future Wave 5 image can run after k3d image import under host.k3d.internal tag

wave5_resume.required_delivery_step: Before redeploying the Wave 5 dashboard image, run k3d image import for host.k3d.internal:5000/amof-dashboard:<tag> -c amof, then roll the deployment to that tag with IfNotPresent.
